description: Default capability for the main workspace window. `core:default` keeps every plugin baseline that the auto-generated default already granted (path / event / window / webview / app / image / resources / menu / tray); the explicit `core:window:allow-start-dragging` is what lets the custom titlebar drag the OS window — both `data-tauri-drag-region` and `getCurrentWindow().startDragging()` go through this IPC command, and without it both fail silently (the JS path swallows the rejection in shell/windowDrag.ts).
